name: PAPARAZZI
description: Paparazzi-style candid shots. Camera flashes, fashion week chaos, celebrity energy.
asset_requirements: Front-facing outfit on clean background. Back view optional for more angles.

input_manifest.label: Front Outfit
input_manifest.hint: Front-facing product on a clean/white background.

input_manifest.label: Back Outfit
input_manifest.hint: Optional back view for additional outfit detail.

steps.prompt: Paparazzi celebrity street photography. A model wearing the clothing product walks through a crowd of aggressive photographers. Camera flashes popping everywhere, chaotic fashion week sidewalk, the model looks iconic and confident. Shot on 35mm film, high contrast, cinematic grain, editorial quality. The clothing product is clearly visible and photorealistic.

Paparazzi scene in motion. The model walks confidently through a crowd of photographers, cameras flashing rapidly, dynamic handheld camera movement, bokeh background of press photographers. The clothing shown prominently as the model moves through fashion week chaos.
